serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin filter per BMW i4 M maintenance planning.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track-style driving may warrant more frequent checks.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: M-level braking with strong regen; inspect per CBS.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: M Performance electric vehicle inspection; HV-qualified workshop.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: Performance e-drive and battery cooling; follow BMW HV coolant intervals—120,000 km is a common EU planning proxy.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: E-drive cooling circuit; confirm M supplement for your year.
serviceNotes.gearbox fluid: Front and rear drive units: preventive reduction-gear fluid ~100,000 km is a common specialist recommendation despite lifetime claims.
